steps.title: Identify angle relationships
steps.content:
At the intersection of two lines, vertical angles are equal and adjacent angles are supplementary (sum to 180°). From the diagram, angle $ x $ and angle $ w $ are adjacent. So $ x + w = 180$.

$$x = 180 - w$$

steps.title: Substitute known value
steps.content:
Substitute $ w = 112 $ into the equation:
$$x = 180 - 112 = 68$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
